plugins.name: zudoku-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive Zudoku framework skill with progressive disclosure. Teaches documentation lookup (embedded docs from node_modules, remote docs from zudoku.dev/llms.txt), project setup, troubleshooting, and migrations. Single skill for all Zudoku development.

plugins.name: zuplo-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive Zuplo API gateway skill. Teaches documentation lookup (llms.txt, individual doc pages), policy discovery and configuration, route setup, custom handlers, and the request pipeline. Use for all Zuplo development.
